name: heureka-service
description: Heureka feed stack: XML feeds, api-gateway, settings; Aukro API runs from aukro-service repo

scripts.start:dev: concurrently -n "API-GW,HEUREKA" -c "blue,yellow" "cd services/api-gateway && npm run start:dev" "cd services/heureka-service && npm run start:dev"
scripts.ips:check: npm run ips:audit && npm run ips:pre-coding
scripts.verify:task-010-source-parity: export npm_config_cache=/tmp/heureka-npm-cache NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/heureka-npm-cache; npm run verify:health-dependencies && npx ts-node --skip-ignore --compiler-options '{"types":["node"]}' services/heureka-service/src/heureka/feed/feed-preview-readonly.self-test.ts && npx ts-node --skip-ignore --compiler-options '{"types":["node"]}' services/heureka-service/src/public/public-dashboard-routes.self-test.ts && LOGGING_SERVICE_URL=http://logging-microservice:3367 npx ts-node --skip-ignore --compiler-options '{"types":["node"]}' services/api-gateway/src/gateway/gateway-route-parity.self-test.ts && npm --prefix shared run build && LOGGING_SERVICE_URL=http://logging-microservice:3367 npm --prefix services/heureka-service run build && npm --prefix services/api-gateway run build && npm run verify:heureka-order-ingestion && npm run verify:heureka-orders-runtime-readiness && npm run verify:heureka-catalog-token-path && npm run verify:task-010-completion-audit
